name: The Taoism Grandmaster
overview: It has been foretold over three thousand years ago that the apocalypse is impending and that one Taoist grandmaster will emerge to save the world. To give the people a fighting chance, the immortals have gathered a team of gifted individuals in search for the sacred shield.

trailers.title: 【玄门大师】(ENG SUB) The Taoism Grandmaster 01 热血少年团闯阵救世（主演：佟梦实、王秀竹、裴子添）
